## Summary

- What public learning content or repo doc did you change?
- Why does this help readers or contributors?

## Checks

- [ ] I only added or edited public, desensitized content.
- [ ] I did not include private notes, screenshots, raw course material, or credentials.
- [ ] I ran `pwsh ./tools/publication-check.ps1 .`
- [ ] I did not stage ignored local-only folders such as `docs/maintenance/` or `scripts/ralph/`.
